tasks.title: Define carrier capability projection schema
tasks.goal: Define the bounded capability projection schema used by Narada-native sessions.
tasks.context: The carrier must receive projected references and grant posture, not raw secrets or implicit authority.
required_work: Define fields for capability_ref, capability_kind, consent_ref, credential_ref_present, grant_status, grant_freshness, revocation_status, scope_summary, raw_secret_values_recorded=false, and projected_capabilities_are_not_grants=true.
Represent provider, data-read, fixture-only, missing, revoked, and stale projections.
Add schema tests for every projection state.
non_goals: Do not implement the canonical consent registry itself.
Do not store raw credentials or raw secret values in carrier files.
Do not grant mutation authority through projection records.
acceptance_criteria: A capability projection schema exists with explicit grant, consent, credential-reference, freshness, and revocation posture.
Provider, data-read, fixture-only, missing, revoked, and stale projections are covered.
Tests prove raw secret values are absent and projected capabilities are not grants.

tasks.title: Implement provider capability projection lookup
tasks.goal: Resolve provider capability refs into bounded provider invocation posture.
tasks.context: Provider adapters need to know whether invocation is allowed without receiving raw credential material.
required_work: Use provider registration capability_ref as lookup input.
Return credential reference presence, policy refs, scope summary, consent refs, grant freshness, and revocation status only.
Refuse missing_capability_ref, missing_consent_record, revoked_capability, stale_grant, and secret_bearing_capability_material.
Add tests proving each refusal is bounded and redacted.
non_goals: Do not return raw credential values.
Do not infer consent from provider config presence.
Do not invoke provider transport in this lookup.
acceptance_criteria: Provider capability lookup returns bounded projection posture only.
All specified refusal states are represented.
Tests prove refusal evidence is redacted and non-mutating.

tasks.title: Implement data-read capability projection lookup
tasks.goal: Bind to-data read families to explicit read capability projections.
tasks.context: Data reads require their own consent posture and must not be implied by provider configuration.
required_work: Bind task_read_packet, work_next_peek, inbox_summary_read, carrier_readiness_read, carrier_evidence_ref_read, and site_file_excerpt_read to explicit projections.
Return bounded grant, consent, freshness, and revocation posture for each read family.
Add tests proving missing read consent blocks the matching reader without blocking fixture-only carrier lifecycle.
non_goals: Do not collapse all reads into one broad filesystem or task capability.
Do not grant mutation capabilities to to-data readers.
Do not require provider capability to read fixture-only readiness evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Every to-data read family has an explicit projection lookup.
Missing data-read consent blocks only the matching read family.
Tests prove fixture-only lifecycle remains inspectable without provider capability.

tasks.title: Wire projections into session start and supervisor doctor
tasks.goal: Expose capability projection posture through session start evidence and supervisor doctor output.
tasks.context: Operators need to see configured, blocked, revoked, stale, and fixture-only states without reading secret stores.
required_work: Record projection refs and statuses at session start, not grants or secrets.
Update supervisor doctor to report configured, blocked_missing_consent, blocked_revoked, blocked_stale, and fixture_only states.
Add doctor and reconstruction tests covering each state and proving raw secret values are absent.
non_goals: Do not reveal credential material in doctor output.
Do not make supervisor doctor an authority locus.
Do not require direct secret-store inspection for ordinary reconstruction.
acceptance_criteria: Session start evidence includes projection refs and statuses only.
Supervisor doctor distinguishes configured, missing consent, revoked, stale, and fixture-only states.
Tests prove raw secret values are absent.

tasks.title: Integrate projection checks into provider and to-data execution
tasks.goal: Require valid capability projections before provider transport or to-data reader execution.
tasks.context: Projection posture must be enforced before the carrier touches provider transport or protected read surfaces.
required_work: Require valid provider projection before provider invocation.
Require valid read-family projection before each protected to-data reader.
Emit blocked or refused evidence before provider transport or data reader execution when grants are revoked, stale, or missing.
Add tests proving no provider transport call or data reader call occurs after revoked, stale, or missing consent.
non_goals: Do not implement consent override paths in the carrier.
Do not perform live credential reveal in tests.
Do not grant mutation capabilities through execution checks.
acceptance_criteria: Provider invocation and protected to-data reads require valid projections.
Revoked, stale, and missing grants block before transport or read execution.
Tests prove no blocked transport or protected reader call occurs.

tasks.title: Add capability-consent reconstruction proof
tasks.goal: Prove session capability posture can be reconstructed from bounded carrier evidence.
tasks.context: Reconstruction should not require raw secret-store inspection or unbounded transcripts.
required_work: Reconstruct session capability posture from durable session evidence and registration/projection summaries.
Assert no direct secret-store inspection is required for reconstruction.
Assert raw secret fields are absent from evidence and doctor output.
Document residuals owned by canonical capability-governed secret management.
non_goals: Do not implement credential reveal, use, rotation, or revocation authority in the carrier.
Do not store raw secret material for reconstruction.
Do not make reconstructed posture equivalent to canonical consent truth.
acceptance_criteria: Capability posture reconstructs from bounded session and projection evidence.
No direct secret-store inspection is required for reconstruction.
Tests prove raw secret fields are absent and residual ownership is explicit.
